About

Property Marketing Done Properly

Property Flash is a specialist property marketing service covering Leeds, Bradford and the surrounding areas of West Yorkshire.

We focus on producing high-quality photography, accurate floor plans and all the supporting documentation estate agents need — delivered quickly, reliably and without any fuss.

All four services can be completed in a single visit, meaning less hassle for you and faster turnaround times for your vendors. We work with estate agents of all sizes across West Yorkshire and take pride in being easy to work with, every time.

For Vendors

Preparing Your Property for the Shoot

A well-prepared property makes a stronger listing. Share this checklist with your vendors before the appointment so we can capture the best of every room.

Clear All Worktops

Kitchens should be free of kettles, chopping boards, tea towels and clutter. Clean, empty surfaces make spaces feel bigger.

Let In the Light

Open all curtains and blinds, turn on every lamp and ceiling light. Natural light plus lamps gives the warmest result.

Make Every Bed

Beds dressed neatly, pillows plumped, laundry hidden. Bedrooms are often the weakest photos when rushed.

Hide Personal Items

Family photos, bathroom toiletries, fridge magnets, pet bowls. Neutral rooms help buyers imagine themselves living there.

Tidy Outside

Cut the grass, put bins away, clear pathways, move cars off the drive. The front exterior is the first photo buyers see.

Allow 60–90 Minutes

A full photography + floor plan + EPC appointment takes about an hour. Vendors do not need to be there — our assessor is DBS checked.

Credentials & Reviews

Accredited, Insured, Accountable

Property Flash is building its reputation the honest way: one satisfied agent at a time. Here's what you can verify about us today.

DBS Checked

Every assessor who attends a property has an up-to-date Disclosure and Barring Service background check.

Elmhurst Accredited

Registered Domestic Energy Assessor with Elmhurst Energy — the UK's largest accreditation scheme for EPCs.

Fully Insured

Public Liability Insurance covers every visit, giving you and your vendors peace of mind from the moment we arrive.

Worked with us? Your review would mean a lot.

Property Flash is an established, growing business. Honest feedback from estate agents is how we build trust with new clients — it takes under two minutes.
